name: executing-red-team-engagement-planning
description: Red team engagement planning is the foundational phase that defines scope, objectives, rules of engagement (ROE), threat model selection, and operational timelines before any offensive testing begins.
author: mahipal

reasons: Contains authorized security testing or incident response procedures that may require explicit scope and approval.

sourceNotice: Source: This skill is adapted from the open-source project https://github.com/mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills.
